app-brand: Application brand name. Displayed in the header.
nav-home: Link text to go back to the home page.
hero-eyebrow: Small label above the main title on the home page.
hero-title: Main heading on the home page. Now focused on reusing Wikidata queries.
hero-description: Introductory paragraph on the home page.
topics-title: Heading for the topics section on the home page.
topic-queries-count: Shows the number of queries for a topic. $1 is the count.
select-country: Label for the country selector dropdown.
select-topic: Label for the topic selector dropdown.
btn-view-query: Button text to open the SPARQL query on Wikidata Query Service.
btn-adapt: Button text to show adaptation instructions for a query.
btn-hide-adapt: Button text to hide adaptation instructions.
adapt-title: Heading inside the adaptation info box.
adapt-line-prefix: Prefix before the code line that needs to be changed.
adapt-more-items: Text showing how many more adaptation items exist.
topic-dominio-publico-title: Topic page title for public domain.
topic-dominio-publico-desc: Topic page description for public domain.
query-monumentos-title: Query card title. $1 is the selected country name.
query-monumentos-desc: Description of the monuments SPARQL query.
query-lugares-memoria-title: Query card title. $1 is the selected country name.
query-lugares-memoria-desc: Description of the memory sites SPARQL query.
query-obras-title: Query card title. $1 is the selected country name.
query-obras-desc: Description of the artworks SPARQL query.
query-personajes-title: Query card title. $1 is the selected country name.
query-personajes-desc: Description of the historical figures SPARQL query.
back-home: Link text to go back to the home page from a topic page.
lang-label: Placeholder for the language search input in the ULS-style selector.
suggested-languages: Heading for the suggested languages section in the language selector.
all-languages: Heading for the full language list in the language selector.
search-results: Heading shown when the user is searching languages.
no-language-results: Message shown when no languages match the search query.
search-queries: Label for the combined search input on the home page.
search-placeholder: Placeholder text for the combined search input.
all-topics: Default option label for the topic selector meaning no topic filter.
results-count: Heading showing the number of matching queries. $1 is the count.
no-results: Message shown when no queries match the current filters.
btn-view-query-detail: Button text to open the internal query detail page.
detail-what-it-does: Heading for the section explaining what the query does.
detail-use-cases: Heading for the list of use cases.
detail-prerequisites: Heading for the list of prerequisites.
detail-data-sources: Heading for the list of data sources.
detail-adaptation-guide: Heading for the step-by-step adaptation guide.
query-not-found-title: Title shown when a query id does not exist.
query-not-found-desc: Description shown when a query id does not exist.
playground-title: Heading for the SPARQL editor and execution section.
playground-run: Button text to run the SPARQL query.
playground-running: Button text shown while a query is running.
playground-loading: Loading message shown while query results are loading.
playground-results: Heading showing the number of query results. $1 is the count.
playground-open-wikidata: Button text to open the current query on Wikidata Query Service.
playground-error: Error message shown when query execution fails.

nav-contributions: Navigation link to the contributions page.
contributions-desc: Description of the contributions page explaining it's a collaborative project.
contributions-how-desc: Text asking users to include specific information.
contributions-how-cta: Text with link to Wikidata talk page.
contributions-include-title: Heading for the required information list.
contributions-include-3: Required information item 3: link to query.
contributions-cta-button: Button text to go to Wikidata discussion page.
contributions-cta-hint: Hint text below the CTA button.
